aurivian_oversight.name: Aurivian Oversight
aurivian_oversight.purpose: Track company priorities, strategy execution, and next best actions

items.title: Team Alignment Session Prep
items.description: Prepare talking points for this week's alignment session with Zeinab, Zee, Michail, Ross. Focus: vision alignment, role clarity, founder integration, timeline for team dedication.

items.title: Decision Authority Map
items.description: Create org chart showing decision authority: Who decides on pricing? Product roadmap? Sales strategy? Helps clarify roles and prevent conflicts.

items.title: Weekly Terumo Status
items.description: Check: Is Terumo moving? Do we have a contact? What's blocking? Follow up with Ross on status.

items.title: Argenx Pilot Paperwork
items.description: Check: What does Argenx (Rico) need from us to close? Contract? SOW? Pricing? Pilot timeline?

competitive_intelligence.name: Competitive Intelligence
competitive_intelligence.purpose: Monitor AI/GenAI/agentic vendors, track market moves, identify threats and opportunities

items.title: Snowflake Cortex Q2 Updates
items.description: Search for Snowflake Cortex announcements (June 2026): new agent templates, healthcare compliance, pricing changes, pharma case studies.

items.title: Sorcero Market Moves
items.description: Any recent Sorcero funding, customer wins/losses, pricing changes, GenAI product launches?

items.title: Copilot + Healthcare
items.description: Microsoft Copilot announcements for healthcare/pharma. New agentic AI features?

items.title: Consultancy Moves (ZS, IQVIA, Axtria)
items.description: Any new MA intelligence products? AI hiring? Partnerships?

business_development.name: Business Development
business_development.purpose: Extract top 3 opportunities from BDR agent, track hot leads, accelerate sales pipeline

items.title: BDR Agent: Top 3 Opportunities This Week
items.description: Run BDR agent (or check latest outputs/prospects/*.csv). Identify top 3 companies by fit score. Summarize: company, trigger event, fit rationale, next action.

items.title: Pipeline Status: Hot Leads
items.description: Which prospects from last week are still hot? Any follow-ups needed? Where's the bottleneck (prospect? capability? messaging)?

items.title: Accelerated Sales Motion Feasibility
items.description: Founder question: Can we automate parts of sales (BDR outreach, research, personalized demo, Pulse email)? Research: Pharma security constraints on videos/links/attachments. Draft spec.

items.title: Demo Quality Check
items.description: Are our demos nailing the story? Is it clear why we win vs. Sorcero/Snowflake/consultancies? Feedback for Ross's next demo.

funding.name: Funding Opportunities
funding.purpose: Identify angels, grants, and funding pathways to extend runway

items.title: Angel Prospect List: Warm Intros
items.description: Build list of 10 ex-GSK, Randy (Stealth), other angels mentioned by founder. Research backgrounds. Strategy for warm intros.

items.title: SBIR Phase I Eligibility Check
items.description: Is Aurivian eligible for NIH SBIR (National Institutes of Health Small Business Innovation Research)? Research NIH focus areas (NCCIH, NLM) aligned with our work. Timeline?

items.title: Angel Pitch One-Pager
items.description: Draft 1-pager for angels: problem, solution, market, why now, why us, ask. Tie to margin-positive ops model and AI-native strategy.

items.title: 6-Month Runway Narrative
items.description: If we raise $300-500K, what does that buy us? Team fully dedicated? Product polish? New hires? Be specific on use of funds.

breaking_news_alerts.threshold: material change to strategy, major competitive move, urgent opportunity, blocking issue
examples: Sorcero announces acquisition or major funding
New pharma uses Snowflake Cortex + agents (validates internal build threat)
BDR finds a company that just fired all consultants (hot prospect)

notes: This is the Chief of Staff work queue. Items are added/updated by the founder and the Chief of Staff. Status moves: pending → in_progress → blocked/done. Breaking news alerts interrupt the regular 2-hour cycle if material enough.
